hero.name: MOHAMMAD ASRAR
hero.subtitle: UL HAQUE AHANGER
hero.description: Building data-driven solutions and crafting efficient, user-friendly web applications. Passionate about technology that creates real-world impact.

about.title: ABOUT ME
text: I'm an aspiring Data Analyst, Python Developer, and Web/App Developer currently pursuing my Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science at M. Kumarasamy College of Engineering.
Currently in my 4th semester, actively building projects in web/app development and data analysis while participating in hackathons and technical team activities.
Passionate about creating solutions that bridge technology and community needs — most notably with KashCare, my ongoing healthcare startup.

education.details: Currently in 4th Semester · Focused on programming, data analysis, and app/web development

about.location: Bandipora, J&K, India 193501 · Available for remote opportunities
about.certification: BIT Participate Certification - Recognized participation in technical events and competitions
